message:
🌱 Make card refresh pulse animation more subtle (#177)

* ✨ Implement real multi-cluster deploy backend

- Replace placeholder DeployWorkload() with real implementation that
  fetches manifests from source cluster, cleans metadata, normalizes
  image names for CRI-O, and applies to targets in parallel
- Add deploy-status polling endpoint for tracking rollout progress
- Add cluster group CRUD endpoints with node labeling
- Stamp deployed resources with user identity and source metadata
- Add LabelClusterNodes/RemoveClusterNodeLabels for group management

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add inter-card event bus and deploy tracking hooks

- CardEventProvider: typed pub/sub context for card-to-card messaging
- useClusterGroups: CRUD for user-defined cluster groups with backend
  sync for label management (kubestellar.io/group=<name>)
- useDeployMissions: subscribes to deploy:started events, polls
  deploy-status per cluster, tracks mission lifecycle with
  space-themed statuses (launching/orbit/abort)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add Cluster Groups and Missions card components

- ClusterGroups card: droppable target for workload deploys, shows
  user-defined groups with cluster badges, health dots, inline
  create/edit forms with color picker and cluster selector
- Missions card: tracks deploy rollout progress with per-cluster
  progress bars, space-themed status (launching/deploying/orbit/abort),
  elapsed time counter, and persistent history

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Wire cross-card drag-and-drop deploy in Dashboard

- Register cluster_groups and missions cards in cardRegistry
- Add both cards to AddCardModal catalog under Workloads
- Wrap App with CardEventProvider for inter-card messaging
- Add handleDragEnd logic: detect workload dropped on cluster group,
  fire deploy API, publish deploy:started event to Missions card
- Add missions to LIVE_DATA_CARDS set for real-time badge

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Make card refresh pulse animation more subtle

Reduce the card refresh pulse from a bright blue glow with box-shadow
to a gentle border tint that fades out over 1s with a 1px border
thickening. Much less distracting while still providing visual feedback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

((readyClusters + failedClusters) / totalClusters) * 100 : 0 + + return ( +

 // Module-level cache for dashboard data (survives navigation)
 interface CachedDashboard {
@@ -136,6 +138,10 @@ export function Dashboard() {
   // Universal stats for cross-dashboard stat blocks
   const { getStatValue: getUniversalStatValue } = useUniversalStats()
 
+  // Inter-card event bus for cross-card deploy
+  const publishCardEvent = useCardPublish()
+  const { mutate: deployWorkload } = useDeployWorkload()
+
   // Stats calculations for StatsOverview
   const healthyClusters = clusters.filter(c => c.healthy).length
   const unhealthyClusters = clusters.filter(c => !c.healthy).length
@@ -231,6 +237,63 @@ export function Dashboard() {
 
     if (!over) return
 
+    // Check if a workload was dropped on a cluster group (cross-card deploy)
+    if (
+      active.data.current?.type === 'workload' &&
+      String(over.id).startsWith('cluster-group-')
+    ) {
+      const workloadData = active.data.current.workload as {
+        name: string
+        namespace: string
+        sourceCluster: string
+        currentClusters: string[]
+      }
+      const groupData = over.data.current as {
+        groupName: string
+        clusters: string[]
+      }
+
+      if (groupData?.clusters?.length > 0) {
+        const deployId = `deploy-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`
+
+        // Publish deploy:started event immediately for the Missions card
+        publishCardEvent({
+          type: 'deploy:started',
+          payload: {
+            id: deployId,
+            workload: workloadData.name,
+            namespace: workloadData.namespace,
+            sourceCluster: workloadData.sourceCluster,
+            targetClusters: groupData.clusters,
+            groupName: groupData.groupName,
+            timestamp: Date.now(),
+          },
+        })
+
+        showToast(
+          `Deploying ${workloadData.name} to ${groupData.clusters.length} cluster${groupData.clusters.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''} in "${groupData.groupName}"`,
+          'success'
+        )
+
+        // Fire the actual deploy API call
+        try {
+          await deployWorkload({
+            workloadName: workloadData.name,
+            namespace: workloadData.namespace,
+            sourceCluster: workloadData.sourceCluster,
+            targetClusters: groupData.clusters,
+          })
+        } catch (err) {
+          console.error('Deploy failed:', err)
+          showToast(
+            `Deploy failed: ${err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Unknown error'}`,
+            'error'
+          )
+        }
+      }
+      return
+    }
+
     // Check if dropped on another dashboard
     if (String(over.id).startsWith('dashboard-drop-')) {
       const targetDashboardId = over.data?.current?.dashboardId
